chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl. No.2391 of 2023 (Mumtaz Ali & others vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A. No.7475/2024 2. For hearing of Bail Application. 20.06.2024. Applicant/Accused Sarmand Sindhi is present in person Mr. Khadim Hussain, Addl: PG Sindh a/w Complainant O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Complainant is present in person in response to notice. In his FIR, he has stated that police officials deputed at Falcon Society Main Gate on three motorcycle stopped him and then after abusing him committed robbery of Rs.6000/-, two bottles of branded perfume. He out of apprehension to his life remained silent but ultimately reported the matter to the Police Station on 05.10.2023. 2. In the investigation, applicant No.2 (Sarmad Sindhi) was identified as one of the accused. It is reported that the trial has commenced and evidence of complainant has been recorded but he has not identified applicant Sarmad Sindhi to be accused of the case. Even today, he has stated that he does not recognize the applicant to be the same person. 3. Learned Addl: PG Sindh, in view of above fact has not recorded no objection. 4. Applicant’s counsel is not present but I have heard applicant No.2 in person. In view of the above facts and circumstances, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant No.2 (Sarmad Sindhi) vide order dated 24.10.2023 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
